comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Admin nav link (1.8.2): reverse trip — every page's navbar now has an 'Admin' item after About (<li class='nav__admin'>→admin.html), display:none by default. initAdminLink() in script.js checks the shared Supabase session (auth.getSession + onAuthStateChange) and adds .is-visible only when a team member is signed in; public never sees it. Verified: hidden when logged out, shows next to Home/Releases/About when .is-visible. (Open: buy/donate URLs; real artwork/audio; mobile listen-test.)
